# Verify the generated default template for image-based-installation-config.yaml

exec openshift-install image-based create image-config-template --dir $WORK

stderr 'level=info msg=Image-Config-Template created in:'

exists $WORK/image-based-installation-config.yaml

cmp $WORK/image-based-installation-config.yaml $WORK/expected/image-based-installation-config.yaml

-- expected/image-based-installation-config.yaml --
#
# Note: This is a sample ImageBasedInstallationConfig file showing
# which fields are available to aid you in creating your
# own image-based-installation-config.yaml file.
#
apiVersion: v1beta1
kind: ImageBasedInstallationConfig
metadata:
  name: example-image-based-installation-config
# The following fields are required
seedImage: quay.io/openshift-kni/seed-image:4.16.0
seedVersion: 4.16.0
installationDisk: /dev/vda
pullSecret: '<your-pull-secret>'
# networkConfig is optional and configures host networking in NMState format.
# See https://nmstate.io/examples.html for examples.
# 
# Kernel arguments are automatically added ONLY for DUAL-STACK scenarios:
# - Must have exactly 2 machine networks (IPv4 + IPv6) in install-config.yaml
# - Only when user hasn't already provided ip= kernel arguments
# - Adds appropriate args: ip=dhcp, ip=dhcp6, or ip=dhcp,dhcp6
# - Single-stack clusters: no automatic kernel args added
#
# Example: If you already provide kernel args, automatic detection is skipped:
# coreosInstallerArgs: ["--append-karg", "ip=dhcp,dhcp6"]
#
# Example 1 - Both static (no kernel args added):
# networkConfig:
#   interfaces:
#     - name: eth0
#       ipv4:
#         address: [ip: 192.168.122.2, prefix-length: 23]
#         dhcp: false
#       ipv6:
#         address: [ip: 2001:db8::2, prefix-length: 64]
#         dhcp: false
#
# Example 2 - IPv4 static, IPv6 DHCP (gets ip=dhcp6):
# networkConfig:
#   interfaces:
#     - name: eth0
#       ipv4:
#         address: [ip: 192.168.122.2, prefix-length: 23]
#         dhcp: false
#       ipv6:
#         dhcp: true
#
# Example 3 - Both DHCP (gets ip=dhcp,dhcp6):
# networkConfig:
#   interfaces:
#     - name: eth0
#       ipv4:
#         dhcp: true
#       ipv6:
#         dhcp: true
